testCases.title: Do Not Put Effect Events in Dependency Arrays
Initialize App Once, Not Per Mount
Prevent Waterfall Chains in API Routes
Check Cheap Conditions Before Async Flags

correct.code:
const [user, posts, comments] = await Promise.all([
  fetchUser(),
  fetchPosts(),
  fetchComments()
])

incorrect.code: const baseDir = path.join(process.cwd(), 'content/' + contentKind)

correct.code:
const baseDir =
  kind === ContentKind.Blog
    ? path.join(process.cwd(), 'content/blog')
    : path.join(process.cwd(), 'content/docs')

testCases.title: Use Passive Event Listeners for Scrolling Performance
Use flatMap to Map and Filter in One Pass

incorrect.code:
const userNames = users
  .map(user => user.isActive ? user.name : null)
  .filter(Boolean)

testCases.title: Build Index Maps for Repeated Lookups
Early Length Check for Array Comparisons
Use Loop for Min/Max Instead of Sort

incorrect.code:
const allowedIds = ['a', 'b', 'c', ...]
items.filter(item => allowedIds.includes(item.id))

correct.code:
const allowedIds = new Set(['a', 'b', 'c', ...])
items.filter(item => allowedIds.has(item.id))

testCases.title: Use toSorted() Instead of sort() for Immutability
Animate SVG Wrapper Instead of SVG Element
Use defer or async on Script Tags
Use useTransition Over Manual Loading States
Defer State Reads to Usage Point
Extract Default Non-primitive Parameter Value from Memoized Component to Constant
Put Interaction Logic in Event Handlers
Do not wrap a simple expression with a primitive result type in useMemo
Use useDeferredValue for Expensive Derived Renders
Authenticate Server Actions Like API Routes
Avoid Duplicate Serialization in RSC Props

incorrect.code:
// RSC: sends 6 strings (2 arrays × 3 items)
<ClientList usernames={usernames} usernamesOrdered={usernames.toSorted()} />

testCases.title: Hoist Static I/O to Module Level
Avoid Shared Module State for Request Data
Parallel Data Fetching with Component Composition
